productDisplayName: Nike Men Air Max Courtballistec Red Sports Shoes
description: Style Note Built for action on the courts, but perfect as a lifestyle shoe, the nike Courtballistec is best known as Rafael Nadal's signature shoe. The Courtballistec 4.3 features a Hyperfuse composite upper with dual-density Drag-on 2x support, Lunarlon foam midsole with visible Max Air heel unit, and a full-length XDR (extra durable rubber) outsole compound. These are the model updates for the 4.3 from the previous versions of the Courtballistec. Product Details Heavily meshed upper for breathability, with synthetic overlays for enhanced shoe structure Lacing system for a snug, customised Fit Meshed and padded tongue and collar for all-day comfort Outsole reinforced onto the upper at the toe to act as a toe guard Airmax technology on the midsole Lunarlon foam midsole for impact protection and lightweight comfort TPR outsole with flex grooves for ease of movement Patterned grooves for grip and traction Material and Care Mesh Wipe with a clean damp cloth to remove dust Do not store in sunlight
